test_cases.name: basic-collection
test_cases.description: Generate a products collection with basic field types
test_cases.prompt: Create a 'products' collection with these fields: title (required text), price (number), description (textarea), and isPublished (checkbox). It should be in the Content group with the heroShoppingBag icon.

test_cases.name: collection-with-relationship
test_cases.description: Generate an orders collection with relationship to products
test_cases.prompt: Create an 'orders' collection with fields: orderNumber (required text), status (select with options: pending, processing, shipped, delivered), totalAmount (number), and a relationship field to the products collection (hasMany). Put it in the Commerce group.

test_cases.name: collection-with-hooks
test_cases.description: Generate a comments collection with a beforeChange validation hook
test_cases.prompt: Create a 'comments' collection with fields: author (required text), body (required richText), and rating (number, min 1 max 5). Add a beforeChange hook that validates the rating is between 1 and 5. It should be in the Content group.
